title: Get the application log of audiences
content:
Use this endpoint to get the latest application log of custom audiences. Note that this endpoint will only get the log of apply operation (`action_mode` = `Apply`). ## Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/dmp/custom_audience/apply/log/ **Method** GET **Header** ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |Access-Token {Required}|string|Authorized access token. For details, see [Authentication](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1738373164380162).| ``` **Parameters** ```xtable |Field{35%}|Data Type{15%}|Description{50%}| |---|---|---| |advertiser_id {Required}|string|Advertiser ID.| |custom_audience_ids{Required} |string[]|A list of custom audience IDs.

Note
The advertiser must be the owner of the `custom_audience_ids`. Otherwise, an error will occur. You can use the `is_creator` field returned in [/dmp/custom_audience/list/](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1739940506015746) and [/dmp/custom_audience/get/](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1739940507792385) to check whether this advertiser is the owner of this audience. |page|number|Current page number. Default value: 1. |page_size|number|Page size. Default value: 10. |timezone|string|The timezone of returned value. For enum values, see [Appendix - Time Zone](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737586324313089).
If not specified, UTC will be used. ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code) curl --location -g --request GET 'https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/dmp/custom_audience/apply/log?advertiser_id="123"&custom_audience_ids=["123"]' \ --header 'Access-Token: 123' \ --data-raw '' (/code) ``` ## Response ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |code |number|Response code. For the complete list of response codes and descriptions, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |message |string|Response message. For details, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097). | |request_id |string|The log ID of a request, which uniquely identifies the request.| |data |object|Returned Data. | #|advertiser_id|string|Advertiser ID. #|list|list|Array of application data. ##|audience_id|string|Audience ID. ##|adgroup_id|string|Ad group ID. ##|adgroup_name|string|Ad group name. ##|usage_mode|string|Audience's usage mode in the ad group. Enum values: `Include`, `Exclude`. ##|editor|string|Operator. ##|action_timestamp|string|Time when the action took place, in the format of "YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS". #|page_info |object | Pagination information. | ##|page |number | Current page number. | ##|page_size |number | Paging size. | ##|total_number |number | Total number of results. | ##|total_page |number |Total pages of results. | ``` ### Example ``` xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "code": 0, "message": "OK", "request_id": "123", "data": { "advertiser_id": "123", "page_info": { "total_number": 8, "page_size": 10, "page": 1, "total_page": 1 }, "list": [ { "audience_id": "123", "adgroup_name": "123", "action_timestamp": "2022-06-15 11:31:00", "editor": "123", "usage_mode": "Include", "adgroup_id": "123" }, { "audience_id": "123", "adgroup_name": "123", "action_timestamp": "2023-01-23 22:49:06", "editor": "123", "usage_mode": "Exclude", "adgroup_id": "123" } ] } } (/code); ```
